name: Corsair iCUE LINK LX120-R RGB 120mm PWM Reverse Fans Starter Kit - Black - Triple Pack - Reversed Rotor - iCUE LINK System Hub Included - Magnetic Dome Bearing - 18 RGB LEDs per fan (CO-9051050-WW)
